bird.name: Mindoro boobook
bird.summary: The Mindoro boobook or Mindoro hawk-owl (Ninox mindorensis) is a species of owl in the family Strigidae that is endemic to the Philippines.…

locations.name: 瑙漢湖
locations.summary: 瑙漢湖是菲律賓的湖泊，位於民都洛島，由東民都洛省負責管轄，長14公里、寬7公里，面積81.25平方公里，是該國第五大湖泊，海拔高度20米，最大水深45米，該湖被劃為國家公園。 外部連結 Ramsar information sheet

relations.subject: Mindoro boobook
relations.evidence: It occurs in a few protected areas in Mounts Iglit-Baco National Park (which is also the stronghold of the critically endangered Tamaraw) and Naujan Lake National Park

relations.subject: Mindoro boobook
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of legal and illegal logging, mining, conversion into farmlands and urbanization
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Mindoro boobook
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of legal and illegal logging, mining, conversion into farmlands and urbanization
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
